label: claude-optin
description: TUI to manage per-repo Claude Code plugin opt-ins. Lists installed plugins (with skills and agents), shows the effective enabled state and its source (user / project / local), and toggles local overrides written to .claude/settings.local.json (or ~/.claude/settings.json with --global).
example:
~/.local/bin/claude-optin            # toggle opt-ins for the current repo
  ~/.local/bin/claude-optin --global   # edit user-level defaults
